message:
fix(core,fuse,harness,mvcc): internalize block_dev in ext4_add_dir_entry, fix MVCC snapshot capture, and enable zstd compression by default

ffs-core: Moves block_dev acquisition inside ext4_add_dir_entry instead of
accepting it as a parameter, eliminating 5 call sites that passed a
potentially stale block device reference. The method now acquires a fresh
adapter internally and re-acquires it after alloc_blocks_persist to ensure
subsequent extent tree operations see updated block bitmaps. Also re-acquires
block_dev in ext4_mkdir after initial extent allocation.

Fixes MVCC write path: the begin() transaction's snapshot was being computed
but dropped — adds `snapshot = Some(txn.snapshot)` to actually capture it,
so that concurrent reads during the write see a consistent pre-write view.

ffs-fuse: Adds tracing::error instrumentation to the FUSE write dispatch
(offset + len) for debugging write-path issues in production.

ffs-harness: E2E test image creation now sets uid/gid to the current user
and mode to 0100777 on both hello.txt and testdir/nested.txt via debugfs
set_inode_field, preventing EACCES failures when tests run as non-root.
Enables tracing_subscriber in fuse_fsync_after_multiple_writes for write
path debugging.

ffs-mvcc: Changes default CompressionPolicy from CompressionAlgo::None to
CompressionAlgo::Zstd { level: 0 }, enabling transparent zstd compression
for MVCC delta chains by default (level 0 = zstd's own default, ~3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
